zh.lifeSummary: 當Regelindis de Lorraine於0994年出生在法國洛萊姆斯維爾頓時，她的父親Gothelon de Verdun duc de Lotharingie28歲，母親Urraca d'Ivrea30歲。她於1025年與Albert II de Namur結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1064年11月15日在比利時納姆爾納姆爾享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Regelindis de Lorraine于0994年出生在法国洛萊姆斯維爾頓时，她的父亲Gothelon de Verdun duc de Lotharingie28岁，母亲Urraca d'Ivrea30岁。她于1025年与Albert II de Namur结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1064年11月15日在比利时納姆爾納姆爾享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lorraine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Emile, Perrine, Pierre.

French and English: habitational name from Lorraine, a region in the northeastern part of France. Its name derives from the name of the medieval kingdom of Lotharingia, which in turn was named for its sovereign Lothar (a personal name composed of the elements hlūd ‘famous, renowned’ + hari, heri ‘army’).
Altered form of French   Lorrain  , a variant of 1 above.

variants.name: Loring
meanings: English: ethnic name from Old French Lohereng ‘man fromLorraine’ (see Lorraine ).

variants.name: Lorrain
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Adrien, Alban, Andre, Desire, Fernande, Philippe, Pierre.
French: variant of   Lorraine  . This surname is also found in Britain. Compare   Laurain   and   Laurin  .
History: Pierre Lorrain dit Lachapelle from Angliers in Vienne, France, married Françoise Hulin in France c. 1656.

en.lifeSummary: When Regelindis de Lorraine was born in 0994, in Verdun, Meuse, Lorraine, France, her father, Gothelon de Verdun duc de Lotharingie, was 28 and her mother, Urraca d'Ivrea, was 30. She married Albert II de Namur in 1025. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 15 November 1064, in Namur, Namur, Belgium, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Regelindis de Lorraine est née en 0994, à Verdun, Meuse, Lorraine, France, son père, Gothelon de Verdun duc de Lotharingie, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Urraca d'Ivrea, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Albert II de Namur en 1025. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 15 novembre 1064, à Namur, Namur, Belgique, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Regelindis de Lorraine 0994 in Verdun, Meuse, Lothringen, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gothelon de Verdun duc de Lotharingie 28 und ihre Mutter Urraca d'Ivrea 30. Sie hat 1025 Albert II de Namur geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 15. November 1064 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Namur, Namen, Belgien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Regelindis de Lorraine è nata il nel 0994 nel Verdun, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia, sua padre, Gothelon de Verdun duc de Lotharingie, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Urraca d'Ivrea, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Albert II de Namur nel 1025. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 15 novembre 1064, nel Namur, Namur, Belgio, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Regelindis de Lorraineが0994年にフランスロレィヌメウゼバーダンで生まれた時，父Gothelon de Verdun duc de Lotharingieは28歳，母Urraca d'Ivreaは30歳であった。1025年にAlbert II de Namurと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1064年11月15日にベルギーナムルナムルで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Regelindis de Lorraine(이)가 0994년 프랑스 로레이인 우스 베르던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gothelon de Verdun duc de Lotharingie(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Urraca d'Ivrea(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1025년 Albert II de Namur(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1064년 11월 15일 벨기에 남어 남어에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Regelindis de Lorraine nasceu em 0994, em Verdun, Meuse, Lorraine, França, seu pai, Gothelon de Verdun duc de Lotharingie, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Urraca d'Ivrea, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Albert II de Namur em 1025. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 15 de novembro de 1064, em Namur, Namur, Bélgica, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Regelindis de Lorraine родилась в 0994 г. в местности вирдун, меус, лорреаин, Франция, её отцу по имени Gothelon de Verdun duc de Lotharingie было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Urraca d'Ivrea, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Albert II de Namur в 1025 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 15 ноября 1064 г. в местности намур, намур, Бельгия в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Regelindis de Lorraine nació en 0994, en Verdun, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia, su papá, Gothelon de Verdun duc de Lotharingie, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Urraca d'Ivrea, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Albert II de Namur en 1025. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 15 de noviembre de 1064, en Namur, Namur, Bélgica, a la edad de 70 años.
